app.name: Yield
app.tagline: Self-hosted App Store Connect order management
app.description: Self-hosted, open-source App Store Connect order management. Driven entirely by Apple's App Store Server Notifications V2 — real-time, signature-verified orders and push alerts, all on the Cloudflare edge.

hero.title: Your App Store revenue, the moment it happens.
hero.subtitle: A self-hosted App Store Connect console driven entirely by Apple's Server Notifications V2 — no polling, no API keys. Every event is signature-verified, stored, visualized, and pushed to your phone and browser in real time. Runs on the Cloudflare edge.

webhook.title: 100% webhook-driven
webhook.desc: Real-time the instant Apple fires. No polling, no API keys to rotate.

selfHosted.title: Self-hosted · your data
selfHosted.desc: Runs on your own Cloudflare Workers + D1. Nothing leaves your account.

verified.title: Signature-verified
verified.desc: Every event validated against Apple's certificate chain. No shared secrets.

edge.title: Edge-native
edge.desc: Global low latency and low cost, served from the Cloudflare edge.

overview.title: Overview dashboard
overview.desc: KPI cards — orders, FX-converted revenue, active subscriptions, refund rate — plus trend, by-product, subscription-status and by-currency charts. Switch environment and 7/30-day range.

orders.title: Order management
orders.desc: Filter by type, region, status, subscription state and environment. Sort by amount and time, paginate, and open a detail drawer.

feed.title: Notification feed
feed.desc: Every webhook event, filtered by type, subtype and environment, sortable, with a detail drawer.

linking.title: Order ↔ notification linking
linking.desc: Jump from an order to its related notifications and from a notification back to its order. Two-way navigation.

push.title: Multi-channel push
push.desc: Bark + Orange Cloud + Web Push. Localized, emoji-tagged, high-priority ring for revenue events, silent in sandbox, grouped by app.

intake.title: Secure webhook intake
intake.desc: Full ASSN V2 JWS verification, pinned to Apple Root CA G3, with idempotent writes.

settings.title: Settings & customization
settings.desc: Display currency, product-ID → name mapping, push device IDs, push language, browser-notification toggle.

pwa.title: Installable PWA
pwa.desc: Add to home screen, standalone window, with an app icon and service worker.

themes.title: Bilingual + themes
themes.desc: English / Simplified Chinese, light / dark / follow system.

how.label: How it works
how.title: From Apple to your pocket in one hop.

oc.label: Also from us
oc.title: Cloudflare, managed natively — Orange Cloud
oc.desc: Yield comes from the team behind Orange Cloud, the native app for managing your Cloudflare account across Apple devices.

footer.blurb: Self-hosted, real-time App Store order management on the edge.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Yield
login.hint: Data source: App Store Connect Webhook

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: A high-level view of orders and notifications.

orders.title: Orders
orders.description: Order records from App Store Connect.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Webhook notifications from App Store Connect.

settings.title: Settings
settings.prefsDescription: Display currency and push device IDs.
settings.appIdDescription: Only receive push notifications for these Apple App IDs (find it in App Store Connect → App Information). Leave empty to receive notifications for all apps.
settings.noAppIds: No app ID filters — receiving notifications for all apps.
settings.productsDescription: Map full product IDs to readable labels for display.
settings.pushSectionDescription: Receive push notifications in this browser or installed app.
settings.pushUnsupported: This browser doesn't support push notifications.
settings.pushBlocked: Notifications are blocked. Allow them in your browser settings.
settings.pushNoKey: Push isn't configured on the server (missing VAPID key).
settings.webhookDescription: Set this as your App Store Server Notifications V2 URL in App Store Connect. Incoming events are verified, stored, and pushed to Bark / Orange Cloud.

onboarding.welcomeDescription: Let's set up your console before you head to the overview. This takes about a minute and you can change anything later in Settings.
onboarding.prefsDescription: Display currency and push device IDs.
onboarding.pushDescription: Enable push notifications in this browser to get alerted about new orders right away.
onboarding.appIdDescription: Only receive push notifications for these Apple App IDs. Leave empty to receive notifications for all apps. You can skip this and configure it later.
onboarding.noAppIds: No app ID filters — receiving notifications for all apps.
onboarding.productsDescription: Map full product IDs to readable labels for display. You can skip this and add products later.
onboarding.doneDescription: Your console is configured. You can revisit any of these settings from the Settings page at any time.
onboarding.skipHint: You can finish setup anytime from Settings.
